title: kafka-spring-contract-test
pitch: Contract-test Kafka producers/consumers with schema validation and Spring Boot test helpers.
keyFeatures: Schema-driven message validation (JSON Schema/Avro via adapters)
JUnit-friendly fixtures for embedded Kafka and golden messages
Failure diffs that pinpoint breaking field changes
CLI to run contract suites in pipelines
targetUsers: Microservice developers who use Kafka and want repeatable consumer/producer compatibility tests in CI.
